fall-squash-soup.name: Fall Squash Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large soup pot over medium heat until just bubbling and beginning to smell nutty, 1 to 3 minutes. Add onion, celery, and carrot; cook until onion is soft and translucent, another 3 to 5 minutes. Add garlic directly to the bottom of the pot and cook for about 1 minute before stirring; be careful to prevent burning. Add chicken stock, butternut squash, turnip, and sweet potato and bring to a boil. Cover pot and simmer soup until sweet potato is fork tender, about 40 minutes.
Puree soup using a stick blender to desired consistency. Season to taste with cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, and black pepper.

family-arepas-as-made-by-cesar.name: Family Arepas As Made By Cesar
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375˚F (190˚C)
In a large bowl, combine the warm water and salt. Stir until the salt is dissolved.

Slowly add the arepa flour while stirring. Adjust the consistency as needed by adding more water or flour. The dough is ready when it pulls away from the sides of the bowl and doesn’t stick to your fingers.
Grab a fist-sized ball of the dough and pass it from one hand to the other to pat into an even, flattened round. Pay attention to the edges so as to not leave cracks.
Heat the oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the arepas, flipping once, until golden brown in color, 5-7 minutes on each side
Transfer the arepas to the oven and cook for 15 minutes.

Make the chicken avocado salad: In a medium bowl, combine the shredded rotisserie chicken, avocados, lime juice, onion, bell pepper, garlic, mayonnaise, cilantro, salt, and pepper. Mix well to combine.
Cut the arepas in half and stuff with the chicken avocado salad or your favorite fillings.
Enjoy!

fasting-apple-cake-argiro.name: Fasting Apple Cake
instructions: Lubricate with brush and spread anti-stick paper in a long form 10×25 cm.
Preheat the evening to 160°C, in the air.
Shake the flower in a bowl and set aside.
Rub one apple on the grater.
Cut the second apple into small frames and add to a separate bowl.
In a bowl, add the oil, sugar, corn flour and cinnamon and mix with wire.
Add the lemon juice and the soda and mix well.
Add half the flower and mix.
Add the remaining flower and grated apple and mix with spatula until the mixture is homogenized.
Transfer the mixture to the form.
Place the chopped apples on the surface and press them lightly so that they are slightly into the dough.
Place the pan on the medium rack of the evening and make for about 50 minutes, until well cooked and in the center (try with a knife or stick).
Allow the cake to cool complete before taking off.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.

fig-candy-step-by-step-comedera.name: Fig Candy Step By Step
fig-candy-step-by-step-comedera.original_name: Dulce de higos paso a paso
instructions: Wash them well under the water jet and if possible pass them a soft brush.
Do an incision or cross cut at the top, the narrow part of each fig.
Put the figs into a bowl and cover them with water, let them be soaked for an entire day.
Fits and put them into a pot, cover them with water, about 8 cups of water. Add the pint of bicarbonate and make water boil with the figs, cook them for 15 to 20 minutes or until they are soft.
leave the figs in the water they were cooked in for another whole day.
The next day sew water and scrape every fig with delicacy and get as much water as possible.
Put the panels or pyloncillo and spices into a good size pot, add 6 cups of water and cook them with low heat till the panels are completely dissolved and start to become honey.
Add the figs and continue to cook at low heat until the honey is thick about 2 to 3 hours.
Serve hot or cold figs with cuts or cuts of cheese or cheese.

fig-chocolate-mousse-lezzet.name: Fig Chocolate Mousse
instructions: 1. melt the chocolate with bananas.
2. Leave it from January and cool.
3. Take the egg yolks in a bowl and edge.
4. Cook milk and powder sugar constantly stirring in a small sauce pot.
5. Start boiling and leave it from the stove.
6. Stire milk with the help of a whipping by adding on the azar egg yolks.
7. Continue to whip the mole chocolate into milky mixture.
8. Cook the egg whites in a separate bowl, constantly stirring with memaris.
9. When the egg whites begin to warm up, add salt from mine and a pinch.
10. With the help of whipping, continue to slap eggs whites thoroughly until rough.
11. 11. Add 1/3 of egg whites to chocolate mixture and mix well.
12. Add the remaining part and mix the light light weight until the whole material is thoroughly planted.
12. August In a separate bowl, thoroughly remove the cream and add it to the chocolate mixture.
14 July Share the mixture into service containers.
15. Listen to 2 hours in refrigerator.
16. For over, wash and remove the figs in the dör and take it into a pan.

filo-pastry-puffs-with-goat-cheese-telec.name: Filo Pastry Puffs With Goat Cheese
filo-pastry-puffs-with-goat-cheese-telec.original_name: Folhadinhos de massa filo com queijo de cabra
instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Brush 4 sheets of phylum with melted butter and place them on each other. Repeat the operation until you get 5 sets.

Cut the chèvre cheese into slices, divide them into the leaves of pasta, wrap it in a tush and close the ends tightly, as you see in the photo. Brush with more melted butter, sprinkle with sesame seeds to taste and put them in the oven until they are golden.
Retire do forno, regue com o mel e sirva decorados a gosto e acompanhados com salada.

fish-burger-argiro.name: Fish Burger

ingredients.item: 2 ounces of pickles and some salt from the jar
2 ounces of pickles and some salt from the jar

instructions: Cut the onion into think slide rings.
In a bowl, add the onion, the pickle cupcake cut into slides and the pickled brine.
Mix and set aside to marinate the opinions.
In a bowl, add the mayonnaise, tabasco, lemon, dill and some salt.
Mix the injectors.
Cut the iceberg.
Split the buns in half.
Rub the bread with the mayonnaise inside.
If you want mayonnaise without egg or mayonnaise with avocado.
Add the iceberg chopped, touch the fried fish above and the onions and pickles.
Cover the burger with the other bread.
We also prepare the other.
Serve with potato chips and lemon quarters.
The fish burger fits well with the tartar sauce.

fish-liver-with-pasta-argiro.name: Fish Liverpool With Pasta
instructions: Clean the fishnet and cut it into thin stripes, then into stripes.
Heat the olive oil in a plate pot and sauté the fish-nefrey for 3-4 minutes until golden.
Add the onion and leek and sauce for 2-3 minutes.
Then add the mushrooms and let them absorb their liquids.
Add the tomatoes cut in half, grated Carrot and garlic and sauce for 2-3 minutes.
Pour hot water or white dry wine.
Add the herbs, rub a lot of pepper and simmer for 15 minutes until the sauce thinks well.
Dilute the yogurt in a bowl with some of the sauce and pour it into the pan with the rest of the entredients.
Boil the taliatelles in salted moiling water for 6 minutes.
As soon as they draw, add them to the sauce and bottle on high heat for 1-2 minutes.
Remove from heat, add the cheese and mix well.
Serve the pasta immediately with the fillets of fish nefri, warm and aromatic.

fish-milanese.name: Fish Milanese

ingredients.prep: boneless gray sole or flounder fillets (about 1 0.5 pounds total)

instructions: Cook cilantro in a medium pot of boiling salted water until wilted, about 20 seconds. Drain and transfer cilantro to a bowl of ice water. Swish around in water to cool. Drain, then squeeze excess liquid from herbs with your hands.

Purée cilantro, ginger, and 2 Tbsp. water in a blender until almost smooth. With motor running, gradually stream in oil and blend until smooth. Strain cilantro oil through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; discard any solids. Mix lime juice into oil and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Cilantro oil (without lime juice and salt) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before adding lime juice and salt.

Process panko in a food processor until very finely ground (it will only take 45–60 seconds). Transfer to a shallow bowl. Place egg yolks in another shallow bowl and whisk in buttermilk. Place cornstarch in a third shallow bowl. Line a rimmed baking sheet with paper towels and set a wire rack inside.

Working with 1 fillet at a time, season with kosher salt on both sides and dredge in cornstarch, shaking off excess. Dip in egg mixture, letting excess drip back into bowl, then coat in panko, pressing to adhere before shaking off excess. Repeat steps to make a second coating. Place on a rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining fillets.

Pour oil into a large heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, to come 1" up sides. Heat oil over medium-high until an instant-read thermometer registers 350°–365° (Don’t let the tip of the thermometer touch the bottom of the skillet). Carefully lower a fillet along the side of skillet closest to you and let slide away from you into oil. Carefully swirl oil in skillet and cook fish just until golden on the bottom, about 2 minutes. Using a fish spatula or slotted spoon, carefully turn fish over and cook until golden on the other side, about 2 minutes. Transfer fish to wire rack in prepared baking sheet and season with sea salt while still hot. Repeat with remaining fillets.
Toss cucumbers, fennel, onion, chile, cilantro oil, and a pinch of kosher salt in a medium bowl and top with some cilantro.
Serve fish with cucumber ceviche and lime wedges.

flammkuchen-bread-bowl.name: Flammkuchen Bread Bowl
instructions: Preheat oven to 249°C/250˚C.
Fry the bacon and the onions in a pan.
Mix fried onions, bacon, and sour cream in a bowl and season with pepper.
Cut off the top of the bread and remove the inside with a spoon.
Fill the bread with the sour cream mixture and cover with gruyère cheese.
Spread butter on the leftover bread, cut into thick chunks, and place on a baking tray together with the bread bowl.
Bake for 15 minutes or until the bread is crispy and the cheese golden brown.
Enjoy!

flatbread-with-castelfranco-burrata-appl.name: Flatbread With Castelfranco, Burrata, Apples, And Olives

ingredients.prep: crisp apple (such as Pink Lady or Gala), thinly sliced crosswise

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Mix olives and ¼ cup olive oil in a small bowl; set aside.

Divide pizza dough into 4 portions. Drizzle some olive oil onto 2 rimmed baking sheets. Stretch or roll each piece of dough into a very thin round (irregular shapes are encouraged) and place on baking sheets. Drizzle with remaining 2 Tbsp. olive oil and bake until golden brown, 8–10 minutes. While crusts are still warm, rub with cut side of garlic.
Toss radicchio with 2 Tbsp. black olive mixture in a medium bowl; season with kosher salt and pepper.

Top flatbread with burrata, drizzle with remaining black olive mixture, and mound half of dressed radicchio over cheese. Bake until cheese is just warmed through and greens are slightly wilted, about 4 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss remaining dressed radicchio with apple, mint, and vinegar; divide salad among warm flatbreads. Sprinkle with sea salt.

fluffy-gluten-free-lemon-cake-with-lemon.name: Fluffy Gluten-free Lemon Cake (with Lemon Glaze)
fluffy-gluten-free-lemon-cake-with-lemon.original_name: Bizcocho de limón sin gluten esponjoso (con glaseado de limón)

ingredients.item: 130 g gluten free premixture (I used 65 g of fine rice flour and 65 g of mandioca starch and a baking powder spoon) *
Las hojitas de 3 o 4 ramitas de tomillo

instructions: To purify the oven at 180 ° C. To mix into a processing machine all the ingredients: butter, sugar, chewed flour with yeast, eggs and frilling of lemons, poppy seeds and thyme pits.
Add milk to have a soft texture. Filling and pounding a mold
Bake in the pressurized oven at 180 ° C for 35 minutes. Do the stick test, if by clicking the biscuit goes dry, it's ready.

A few minutes before you get the biscuit out of the oven, prepare the frying. In the package intended for frying, sig glutan-free sugar and add half-lemon juice. Mix well to get a smooth and homogenous texture. If necessary, add more lemon juice or sugar glas to adjust the consistency of the frying.

Once the biscuit's ready, remove it from the oven and let it cool into the mold for a few minutes. Then carefully remove and place it onto a grid to completely cool. Once the biscuits are cold, put the lemon frying onto the top and let them scatter their sides decoratively. If you wish, you can add lemon or fine slice of lemon as an additional décor.
fluffy-gluten-free-lemon-cake-with-lemon.category: Easy Beer Recipes, Home Stretch Recipes

fluffy-pineapple-cake-teleculinaria.name: Fluffy Pineapple Cake
instructions: Fill a form with butter and sprinkle it with flour. Reserve. In a bowl, beat the butter very well with sugar, until you get a cute, bulky cream.
Then add the yogurt, yolks and vanilla, as well as the pineapple slices, run and cut into pieces. Involve again very well.
In a separate bowl, beat the clears into a very firm castle and wrap them in the previous preparation. Finally, carefully incorporate flour and yeast.

Lay the dough in shape and put it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 40 minutes. Stick a toothpick to check the cooking, remove it and let it cool. Deform and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

fork-lezzet.name: Fork
instructions: 1. Mix the butter, sunflower oil, egg, powder sugar, salt, phosphorus and kneading container.
2. Add and knead the baking powder with flour to this mixture.
3. Do long strips on the copartum and kitchen countertops from the dough you are kneading.
4. Combine two sides of the strips you prepared and two ends.
5. Give the fork shape by combining the tips and placed in the other strip.
6. Prepare all dough in the same way.
7. Spread the egg yolk and bump.
8. Oil the oven tray and index the cutlery as intermittent.
9. Preheated 170 degree cook in oven for 25 minutes.
10. Serve your service.
11. 11. You can serve fork with white cheese and beard salad.

15. You can get more tasty results by resting the dough at room temperature.

french-ratatouille-recipe-comedera.name: French Ratatouille Recipe
instructions: To remove the bitter and give texture to the eggplant place cuts onto a flat container, pour water and salt onto them. Let them stand for 20 minutes to get me to bleed. Then run and rinse very well.
Preheat the oven to 188 been 3 been
In a frying pan suitable for an oven pour 2 tablespoons of olive oil, tomato sauce and finely minced basil
It conforms to an eggplant slice, then a slice of tomato and a slice of pumpkin. Do so alternatively till you fill the mold from the inside out. When you're done with salt and pepper with them.
A purple at 188 ″ 3 ″ for 35 minutes or till the vegetable starts to get pink. Decorate with basil and serve.

french-toast-recipe-in-the-airfryer-lezz.name: French Toast Recipe In The Airfryer

ingredients.item: 4 slice thick sliced bread (brioche, challah or hard white bread)
small amount of butter or spray oil (for airfryer basket)
Full wheat bread (more healthy and tok amount)
Maple (you can add less to the distance)

instructions: 1. Mix eggs, milk, vanilla, sugar and tarch well in a container.
2. Pour the bread slices into this mix short timedue (both sides of a fewseconds), let the excess fluid flow.
3. · Do not wait for long  otherwise otherwise bread very unpleasants.
4. Airfryer heat in 190–200°C before.
5. The basket is lightweight oil, bö with bread nonstick.

french-toast-stuffed-with-gila-jam-telec.name: French Toast Stuffed With Gila Jam
french-toast-stuffed-with-gila-jam-telec.original_name: Rabanadas recheadas com doce de gila

ingredients.item: 2 frascos  doce de gila de compra (600 g no total)

instructions: Trim the carcasses with a knife to remove their crust and cut them in half. Divide the gill candy by half and replace the other part over.
Grind the milk, lay it in a bowl, pass the stuffed carcasses, squeeze and press well to close. Then go through the previously beaten eggs and fry them in oil on both sides until they are very golden.
Remove, pour on absorbent paper, then pass a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and serve decorated to taste.

fresh-organic-catsup.name: Fresh Organic Catsup
instructions: Combine the tomatoes, onion, garlic, apple juice, and cayenne pepper in a soup pot. Bring to a boil. Place the bay leaf, cloves, celery seed and peppercorns into a spice bag or wrap in cheesecloth. Add to the pot and continue to boil, stirring frequently until the mixture has reduced by half.

Remove the spice bag and stir in the lemon juice. Continue to boil for 10 more minutes, then remove from the heat. Pour into a container with a lid and refrigerate until using. Use or freeze within 1 week.

fresh-pasta-with-clams-and-hot-italian-s.name: Fresh Pasta With Clams And Hot Italian Sausage
instructions: Combine ½ cup plus 1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour and ¼ cup semolina flour in a large bowl. Add oil and ¼ cup warm water and mix with a fork until a stiff dough forms. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, 8–10 minutes. Wrap tightly in plastic; let sit at room temperature 1 hour.
Cut dough in half. Working with a piece at a time and keeping remaining dough wrapped in plastic, roll dough into a 9x¾" log. Cut on a diagonal into ½" pieces; dust with all-purpose flour.

Working with 1 piece of dough at a time, roll out between your palms to make about 3" strands that taper at the ends. Dust pasta with semolina flour and place on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Cover with a kitchen towel until ready to use.

Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high. Add sausage and cook, breaking into small pieces with a wooden spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until softened, about 1 minute. Add clams and wine; cover. Cook, shaking skillet occasionally, until clams open, about 5 minutes; discard any that do not open.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente, about 3 minutes. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.
Add butter, parsley, pasta, and ½ cup pasta cooking liquid to clams. Cook, tossing and adding more cooking liquid as needed, until sauce coats pasta, about 3 minutes. Taste and season with salt.

fresh-salsa.name: Fresh Salsa
instructions: Combine tomatoes, red onion, yellow onion, green chilies, lime juice, cilantro, garlic, cumin, and salt in a food processor.
Pulse until mixture is combined but still chunky.
Transfer salsa to a bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
Serve with chips.

fried-chicken-biscuits.name: Fried Chicken Biscuits

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken cutlets (about 1 0.5 lb. total), pounded to  0.25” thickness

instructions: Combine buttermilk, hot sauce, salt, black pepper, and cayenne in a resealable plastic bag; add chicken. Seal bag, turn to coat, and chill at least 3 hours.
DO AHEAD: Chicken can be marinated 8 hours ahead. Keep chilled.
Mix butter, honey, and ½ tsp. salt in a small bowl until smooth; set honey butter aside.
Pour oil into a large skillet, preferably cast iron, to a depth of ½” and heat over medium-high heat until oil bubbles immediately when a little panko is added.

Meanwhile, place panko in a shallow bowl. Remove chicken from marinade; season with salt and pepper. Dredge chicken in panko, shaking off excess. Working in 2 batches and maintaining oil temperature, fry chicken until golden brown, crisp, and cooked through, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer chicken to a paper towel–lined baking sheet to drain.
Split biscuits and spread each side with 1 Tbsp. reserved honey butter. Build sandwiches with biscuits, chicken, and hot sauce.

fried-mozzarella-skewers.name: Fried Mozzarella Skewers
instructions: Make the sauce: Pour the olive oil into a large skillet set over medium-high heat. When the olive oil is hot, add the chopped garlic. Cook and stir until garlic is sizzling and fragrant, taking care not to burn it. Add the anchovies and capers, and stir until capers dissolve into the oil. Add the butter and melt it, then pour in the white wine and lemon juice. Bring to a rapid simmer, and cook until reduced by half, about 6 to 7 minutes. Keep warm.

Lay four slices of bread on your work surface. Top with the sliced mozzarella, making sure the cheese does not extend over the edges of the bread, trimming to fit if necessary. Top with remaining bread, to make four sandwiches. Seal each sandwich at each corner with a toothpick (four picks per sandwich).

Spread flour on a rimmed plate. Beat eggs and milk together in a wide, shallow bowl. Heat about 1/2 inch vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat; oil is ready when a crust of bread sizzles on contact.

Dredge sandwiches well in flour, making sure to coat all sides and tap off the excess. Soak the sandwiches on all sides in the egg, letting the excess egg drip back into the bowl. Carefully ease the sandwiches into the oil, and fry until they're golden brown on both sides and the cheese is melted, about 1 to 2 minutes per side. Remove the sandwiches, and drain well on paper towels. Remove the toothpicks and use a serrated knife to cut them in half on the diagonal.
Return the sauce to a simmer, and stir in the parsley. Spread the sauce on four serving plates, then top with a sandwich and serve hot.

fried-sausage-with-greens-and-boiled-pot.name: Fried Sausage With Greens And Boiled Potatoes
fried-sausage-with-greens-and-boiled-pot.original_name: Alheira frita com grelos e batata cozida
instructions: Take a frying pan to medium heat with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, add the dark circles and let them fry until brown. Turn around the dark circles so they don't break the skin. Remove and reserve.
Peel and cut the potatoes in rooms. Put them in a pot and let them cook in water and salt for 15 to 20 minutes. Remove, drain and reserve.

Clean the bottom of the frying pan of the darkeners, add the remaining olive oil, 3 cloves of garlic peeled and chopped and 3 cloves of garlic whole with peel and let saute. Then add the grelos and let them saute until they wilt. Season with salt and pepper and when they are very green, remove and reserve.
In a frying pan aside, take 2 garlic teeth, peeled and rolled, and when they begin to gain color, remove and drain on kitchen paper.
Coloque os grelos numa travessa, disponha as alheiras e polvilhe com o alho frito e um pouco mais de pimenta-preta. Acompanhe com as batatas cozidas e sirva.

fried-squid-with-watercress-and-red-onio.name: Fried Squid With Watercress And Red Onion
fried-squid-with-watercress-and-red-onio.original_name: Lulinhas fritas com agrião e cebola roxa
instructions: Descasque as batatas-doces, corte-as em cubinhos e disponha-os num tabuleiro.
Peel off the onions and garlic, lamine them, add them to the potato, water with the olive oil, cover with aluminium foil and put them in the oven, preheated at 180°C for about 25 minutes.
Pass the squid for flour and fry them in very warm and abundant oil until golden. Remove, pour on absorbent paper and season with salt and pepper.
Add the sweet potato preparation with the cress, season with salt and pepper and serve with the fried squids.

fried-swordfish-with-tomato-sauce-telecu.name: Fried Swordfish With Tomato Sauce
fried-swordfish-with-tomato-sauce-telecu.original_name: Peixe-espada frito com açorda de tomate
instructions: Season the swordfish posts with lemon juice, salt and pepper and let marinate for about 30 minutes.
Break the bread in pieces and crush them in cold water. Pour them well and book them.

Peel and pinch the onions and garlic and praise them in a pot with olive oil. Add the tomatoes cut into small pieces and let cook. Then add the wet bread, wrap well and let cook some more. If necessary, add some of the water you used to scrape the bread so that the açorda becomes more creamy. In the end, gather the chopped cilantro and wrap well.
Pass the fish for flour and fry it on both sides in very hot oil. Serve the fried fish with the tomato açorda.

fritto-misto.name: Fritto Misto

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: trimmed, torn or cut into bite-size pieces

instructions: Vigorously whisk 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour, ¾ cup (107 g) white rice flour, ½ tsp. baking powder, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine. Gradually pour in one 12-oz. can seltzer, whisking constantly until combined (this will ensure a lump-free batter).

Pour vegetable oil into a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot to come 2" up sides (about 6 cups oil). Heat over medium-high until a thermometer, preferably a digital instant-read, inserted into the oil registers 350°. Working one at a time, dredge 4–5 pieces of ½ small fennel bulb, very thinly sliced lengthwise, into batter, gently shaking off excess. Slide into oil and cook, stirring and turning occasionally to prevent sticking, until golden, 4–8 minutes, depending on size. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain; sprinkle lightly with salt. Working in batches, repeat process with remaining fennel pieces until all have been fried. Working in batches as needed, repeat with 4 oz. maiitake or oyster mushrooms, trimmed, torn or cut into bite-size pieces, 6 oz. large shrimp, peeled, deveined, halved lengthwise, and ½ cup basil leaves.
Arrange fritto misto on a platter and serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

frozen-chocolate-mousse-with-cherry-sauc.name: Frozen Chocolate Mousse With Cherry Sauce
instructions: Line an 8½x4½” loaf pan with plastic wrap, leaving a generous overhang on all sides; smooth plastic to avoid lines in finished mousse. Place 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl. Sprinkle gelatin over and let sit 5 minutes.
Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat egg yolks and salt in a large bowl until pale yellow and frothy, about 4 minutes.

Fit a small saucepan with thermometer and bring corn syrup, sugar, and ¼ cup water to a boil. Cook until thermometer registers 238°. Remove from heat and add gelatin, stirring to dissolve. With mixer on medium-low, drizzle syrup into egg mixture. Mix in chocolate.

Using electric mixer with clean beaters, beat cream in a medium bowl to soft peaks. Mix one-third whipped cream into egg mixture. Fold in pistachios, then remaining whipped cream. Scrape mousse into prepared pan; cover tightly with plastic wrap. Freeze until solid, at least 5 hours.
DO AHEAD: Mousse can be frozen 4 days ahead. Keep frozen.
Combine cherries and 2 cups very hot water in a small bowl; let sit 10 minutes to soften.

Meanwhile, bring cherry juice, sugar, and ½ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat. Drain cherries and add to saucepan; simmer until sugar is dissolved and mixture is slightly thickened, 8–12 minutes. Let cool.
DO AHEAD: Cherry sauce can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.
Combine cream, crème fraîche, sugar, and salt in a medium bowl. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; discard pod. Beat to soft peaks.
Let mousse thaw 5–10 minutes, then unmold, unwrap, and slice with a hot knife. Serve with cherry sauce and topping.
DO AHEAD: Topping can be made 30 minutes ahead. Cover and chill.

100-fruit-cake.name: 100% Fruit "cake
instructions: To create the base tier of the cake, cut 3 slices of watermelon, 1 to 2 inches thick, crossways through the center of the melon.
Trim the rind from the watermelon slices, and place the largest slice onto a cake plate.
Alternate layering sliced strawberries, slices of cantaloupe, and slices of fresh pineapple; follow with the second-largest watermelon slice.
Repeat once more to make a layered fruit stack that looks like a cake.
Thinly slice a few pieces of remaining melon and pineapple.
With cookie cutters or a sharp knife, cut remaining fruit slices into decorative shapes.
Decorate the cake tiers with the cut fruit shapes and remaining berries.
Refrigerate until serving time.
To serve, slice the cake with a sharp knife, one wedge at a time, and set the wedge onto a plate.
